flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dominican University New York fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (75.6% → 66.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dominican University New York fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dominican University New York rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (27.0% → 35.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dominican University New York rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (43.5% → 52.5%).
